channel.title: Slopshop Changelog
channel.description: Updates to slopshop.gg — the backend your AI agents are missing

item.title: v3.3.0: Multilingual SEO, Claude 4.6, Security Hardening
item.description: 9 language llms.txt files, 5 landing pages, Claude model updates, SOC2 security page, agent debate mode, memory TTL, credit forecast.

item.title: v3.2.0: 22 Features, Agent Chaining, Persistent Storage
item.description: Agent chains with infinite loops, prompt queue, template marketplace, swarm visualizer, 40/40 live tests passing.
